data.title: Clearwater Paper Launches Velora™ Lightweight Paperboard for Everyday Packaging
data.description: Clearwater Paper Corporation (NYSE: CLW) unveiled Velora™, a novel lightweight folding carton paperboard in Spokane, Washington. Velora is crafted to provide consistent performance, increased efficiency, and cost-effectiveness for common packaging needs. Ideal for converters and brand owners aiming for reliable packaging quality without the premium pricing of SBS grades, Velora suits folding carton and foodservice uses. The product merges durability, adaptability, and reduced basis weights for a variety of applications.

data.title: Advocating for Awareness: RHA Celebrates Developmental Disabilities Awareness Month
data.description: In Atlanta on March 30, 2026, RHA Health Services, a leading provider of top-tier disability care, is acknowledging Developmental Disabilities Awareness Month. During this month, the focus is on celebrating diversity, fostering inclusion, championing for empathetic care, and...

data.title: New Analyses: EPA Consistently Fails to Warn Public of Pesticide Cancer Risks
data.description: On March 30, 2026, it was revealed that the Environmental Protection Agency has consistently neglected to include cancer warnings on pesticide products, despite their own evaluations indicating a significant cancer risk associated with these products. Two recent analyses unveiled this concerning discrepancy, shedding light on a serious issue within the agency. The undisclosed findings underscore the urgency for stricter regulations and transparent communication regarding the potential health hazards posed by various pesticide products. This revelation has sparked concerns regarding public health safety and the efficacy of current regulatory practices within the EPA.

data.title: Sound Seal Adds Two Regional Sales Managers to Support U.S. Growth
data.description: In Agawam, Massachusetts on March 30, 2026, Sound Seal, a brand under Catalyst Acoustics Group and a top manufacturer of noise control solutions for various markets, revealed the recruitment of two new Regional Sales Managers to bolster their team.

data.title: PMGC Holdings Inc. [NASDAQ: ELAB] Reports 2025 Annual Results and Files Form 10-K, Company Expands Asset Base to $13.8M, a 43% Increase from 2024
data.description: PMGC Holdings Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as ELAB, has released its annual results for 2025 and submitted Form 10-K. The company's asset base has grown to $13.8 million, marking a significant 43% surge from the previous year.

data.title: Unicycive Therapeutics Announces Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Los Altos, California, (Nasdaq: UNCY), specializing in treatments for kidney disease, revealed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Additionally, the company unveiled an update regarding its operations.

data.title: Sight Sciences Secures Order on Post-Trial Motions That Preserves the Jury’s Verdict and Awards Monetary Damages to Sight Sciences Against Alcon and its Hydrus® Microstent
data.description: A court upheld a jury's verdict of willful infringement by Alcon, ruling in favor of Sight Sciences and awarding them over $34 million in past damages. Additionally, Alcon is required to pay ongoing royalties to Sight Sciences through November 2028.

data.title: Kraig Biocraft Labs uses 700K+ BAM-1 Alpha hybrids, hitting major growth target.
data.description: A recent report states that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.2% in 2022, a significant increase from the 3.5% growth estimated for 2021. This growth is attributed to the easing of pandemic-related restrictions and increased vaccination rates. However, inflation is expected to rise to 3.7% in 2022, up from 2.7% in 2021. The report highlights the importance of continued efforts to support economic recovery and address inflation concerns. Additionally, global trade is forecasted to expand by 7.2% in 2022 following a 3.7% growth in 2021. These projections emphasize the need for policy actions to ensure sustainable economic growth.

data.title: The Operation of RedotPay Secures ISO/IEC 27001 Certification
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 30, 2026, RedotPay, a fintech specializing in global stablecoin-based payments, revealed that it has obtained the ISO/IEC 27001 certification, marking a significant milestone in setting robust security benchmarks for institutional payments worldwide. This achievement highlights RedotPay's commitment to ensuring the integrity and confidentiality of information, demonstrating its adherence to established international standards. The certification serves as a testament to RedotPay's dedication to enhancing security measures within the financial technology sector.

data.title: Benzinga and Rapunzl Establish Data Relationship to Bring Real-World Market Perspectives into Financial Education
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 30, 2026, it was disclosed that Benzinga, a prominent source of real-time financial news and market data, has established a fresh data partnership with Rapunzl, an interactive investment education platform focused on enhancing financial literacy through practical experience. This collaboration aims to provide users with valuable insights and resources for financial empowerment.

data.title: Women in HVACR opens call for speakers for 2026 annual conference
data.description: Professionals in the industry are invited to participate in discussions on leadership, technology, and career growth. The event will take place in Englewood, Colorado, on March 30, 2026. Women in HVACR (WHVACR), a non-profit organization supporting women in the heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration fields, is hosting the event. Attendees can gain valuable insights and network with industry peers. Don't miss this opportunity to learn from experts and enhance your career prospects. Contact WHVACR for more information.

data.title: Aurora Recognized for Executive Gender Diversity by the Globe & Mail for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: Aurora Cannabis Inc., a prominent Canadian company listed on NASDAQ and TSX with the symbols ACB, was recognized by The Globe and Mail's Report on Business Women Lead Here List for its dedication to inclusive leadership at the executive level. The acknowledgment came on March 30, 2026, and highlights Aurora's efforts in promoting diversity within its leadership team. This recognition further solidifies Aurora's position as a key player in the cannabis industry, with significant influence both nationally and globally.

data.title: Magnachip Launches 8th-Generation 40V and 60V MV MOSFETs for Servers and High-Performance PCs
data.description: In South Korea, Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation introduced its latest 8th-generation 40V and 60V Medium-Voltage (MV) MOSFETs, specifically tailored for server and high-performance PC power supply units. The demand for power in the worldwide server and data center sector is on the rise, emphasizing the significance of power efficiency and density in power semiconductor solutions for these applications. The new MOSFETs aim to address this need.
